x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Broken CI relationship records create dead ends in Now Assist relationship traversal. Orphaned CIs provide zero relationship context for AI impact analysis regardless of attribute quality.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Clean up broken cmdb_rel_ci records via cmdb_rel_ci_list.do?sysparm_query=parent.sys_class_pathISEMPTY^ORchild.sys_class_pathISEMPTY. Enable CMDB Health jobs to automatically identify orphaned CIs. Broken relationships create dead ends in Now Assist impact traversal.
